tasks.label: Configure CIQ SDK + Key (once)
tasks.command: $cfg = @{ sdkHome = '${input:ciqSdkHome}'; devKey = '${input:ciqDevKey}' } | ConvertTo-Json; Set-Content -Path .\.vscode\ciq.local.json -Value $cfg -Encoding UTF8; Write-Output 'Saved .vscode/ciq.local.json'

tasks.label: Build (fr970)
tasks.command: $cfgPath = '.\.vscode\ciq.local.json'; if (-not (Test-Path $cfgPath)) { Write-Error 'Missing .vscode/ciq.local.json. Run task: Configure CIQ SDK + Key (once)'; exit 1 }; $cfg = Get-Content $cfgPath -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $sdk = $cfg.sdkHome; $key = $cfg.devKey; if (-not (Test-Path "$sdk\bin\monkeyc.bat")) { Write-Error "monkeyc.bat not found under $sdk\bin"; exit 1 }; if (-not (Test-Path $key)) { Write-Error "Developer key not found: $key"; exit 1 }; & "$sdk\bin\monkeyc.bat" -f monkey.jungle -o .\bin\LastLapHRZone.prg -d fr970 -w -y $key

tasks.label: Test in Simulator (fr970)
tasks.command: $cfgPath = '.\.vscode\ciq.local.json'; if (-not (Test-Path $cfgPath)) { Write-Error 'Missing .vscode/ciq.local.json. Run task: Configure CIQ SDK + Key (once)'; exit 1 }; $cfg = Get-Content $cfgPath -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $sdk = $cfg.sdkHome; $key = $cfg.devKey; if (-not (Test-Path "$sdk\bin\monkeyc.bat")) { Write-Error "monkeyc.bat not found under $sdk\bin"; exit 1 }; if (-not (Test-Path "$sdk\bin\monkeydo.bat")) { Write-Error "monkeydo.bat not found under $sdk\bin"; exit 1 }; if (-not (Test-Path "$sdk\bin\simulator.exe")) { Write-Error "simulator.exe not found under $sdk\bin"; exit 1 }; if (-not (Test-Path $key)) { Write-Error "Developer key not found: $key"; exit 1 }; & "$sdk\bin\monkeyc.bat" -f monkey.jungle -o .\bin\LastLapHRZone.prg -d fr970 -w -y $key; if (-not (Get-Process -Name simulator -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { Start-Process -FilePath "$sdk\bin\simulator.exe"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4 }; Start-Process -FilePath "$sdk\bin\monkeydo.bat" -ArgumentList '.\bin\LastLapHRZone.prg','fr970'

inputs.description: Connect IQ SDK home path (folder containing bin\monkeyc.bat)
